description: The ProgressBarInterface component is a favoritable item that appears when the user imports a file into Resonite.

fields.ItemName: The name of this favoritable interface.
fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned this favoritable interface.
fields.SpawningUserID: The field containing the ID of the user that spawned this favoritable interface.
fields.IsInstance: Whether this interface is an instance.
fields.ProgressKnown: The field to drive with whether or not the progress is known of the importing item.
fields.Progress: The field to drive with the current progress import percentage from 0 to 1 of the importing item.
fields.ProcessedCountKnown: The field to drive with whether or not the amount of processed items is known for the importing item.
fields.ProcessedItemCount: The field to drive with the number of processed items for the importing item.
fields.TotalItemCountKnown: The field to drive with whether the total number of items that need to be processed for the importing item is known.
fields.TotalItemCount: The field to drive with the total number of items that need to be processed for the importing item.
fields.PhaseName: The field to drive with the current phase name of the importing item being imported is.
fields.SubPhaseName: The field to drive with the current sub phase name of the item being imported.
fields.Stage: The field to drive with the progress stage for the importing item.
fields.HasCompleted: The field to drive with whether the item has finished importing.
fields.HasFailed: The field to drive with whether the item has failed to import.
fields.CompletionMessage: The field to drive with the message for when the item has finished importing.
fields.FailureReason: The field to drive with the failure reason for something to import.
fields.CanBeHidden: The field to drive with whether this import dialogue can be hidden by the user.

usage: Used to make custom import dialogue visuals for a user by saving a custom UI with this component to inventory and setting as custom loading indicator.
